name: Common Cause Client Conversation

output_format.length_rule: ~1.5 screens; longer means transcribing, not synthesizing

goals.label: Operations
goals.satisfied_when: Client walked through how the business actually runs — a real workflow start to finish, where time goes, what's manual.

goals.label: People & pain
goals.satisfied_when: Friction named with a person attached: who is affected, what is stuck, what they tried and abandoned.

goals.label: Existing AI & tooling
goals.satisfied_when: What they use (or pretend to use) is on the table, plus where appetite and skepticism live.

goals.label: Future horizon
goals.satisfied_when: They said what better looks like to them — what they'd do with capacity they got back.

goals.label: Anchor phrase caught
goals.satisfied_when: At least one emotionally loaded verbatim quote banked — energy, frustration, or hesitation. Paraphrase doesn't count.

goals.label: Narrowed to three
goals.satisfied_when: Session closed on 2–3 committed next steps, not an ambitious list of five.

definition_of_done.note: Coverage can be green while momentum is red — the bar shows coverage, the recap tells the truth.

deploy_spec.note: Cory's voice per v2 profile; only the client's own words reflected back

nod_gate: every output lands as status=candidate; nothing commits without approval
provenance: Grounded in the discovery-prep and session-recap skills. Run #1 (Jun 22 Hammer Stars) validated all five deploy outputs structurally; in-section tuning signal deferred to Run #2+.
